title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIIT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIIT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NIIT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT:
NIIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
